title: Squash Pickle Chaat
description: A kid-friendly and ethiopian-inspired squash pickle chaat dish that's peppery and fluffy. Nut-free friendly.

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for a tangy touch

ingredients.name: Cumin Seeds
ingredients.notes: To add warmth and depth of flavor

instructions: Heat coconut milk in a small saucepan until simmering. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice and cumin seeds.
Slice squash into thin rounds and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the hot coconut milk mixture over the squash slices, then add pickles on top and sprinkle some seeds for crunch if using.
Bake for 10 minutes or until the squash is tender.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
